name: stripe-create-checkout-session
description: Generate a hosted Stripe Checkout payment URL for one-time payments, subscriptions, or payment method setup. The returned checkout_url can be sent to the customer via email or webhook for self-service payment. Sessions expire after 24 hours. Supports payment, subscription, and setup modes.

API_KEY_SECRET.description: Vault path to the Stripe secret key.

SUCCESS_URL.description: URL to redirect to after successful payment (must start with https://). Supports {{key}} interpolation. Can include {CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID} for Stripe to replace with the session ID.

CANCEL_URL.description: URL to redirect to when the customer cancels (must start with https://). Supports {{key}} interpolation.

MODE.description: Checkout mode: 'payment' (one-time), 'subscription' (recurring), or 'setup' (save payment method without charging).

PRICE_ID.description: Stripe price ID (price_xxx) for the line item. Required for payment and subscription modes. Supports {{price_id}} interpolation.

CUSTOMER_ID.description: Existing Stripe customer ID (cus_xxx) to associate with the session. Supports {{customer_id}} interpolation.

CUSTOMER_EMAIL.description: Pre-fill the customer's email in the checkout form. Cannot be used if CUSTOMER_ID is set. Supports {{email}} interpolation.

METADATA.description: JSON object of key-value metadata to attach to the session (e.g. '{"order_id": "ord_123"}').

setup_instructions.title: Checkout modes
setup_instructions.detail: Use MODE=payment for one-time charges with PRICE_ID. Use MODE=subscription to start a recurring billing relationship. Use MODE=setup to save a payment method for later use without charging.

setup_instructions.title: Typical payment link workflow
setup_instructions.detail: Chain: [customer sign-up webhook] → [stripe-create-customer] → [stripe-create-checkout-session: MODE=subscription, PRICE_ID=price_xxx, CUSTOMER_ID={{customer_id}}] → [send-gmail: body includes checkout_url].

setup_instructions.title: SUCCESS_URL with session ID
setup_instructions.detail: Set SUCCESS_URL to 'https://yourapp.com/success?session={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}' — Stripe replaces {CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID} with the actual session ID on redirect, so you can verify payment server-side.
